---
name: Protocol amendment proposal
about: Propose a change to the protocol files (discuss before PR)
labels: amendment
---

**Problem** <!-- the defect or gap; a real transcript/example beats theory -->

**Proposed change** <!-- which normative file(s), what rule changes -->

**Blast radius**
- files touched:
- principal-locked paths touched: <!-- none, or justify -->
- version impact: <!-- none / bump to vX.Y -->

**Evidence** <!-- what you ran/observed; how the change was or could be tested -->
